How it works


Connect once.
Reach every trading partner.

EPCIS EDI Serial Numbers Master Data / AS2 SFTP API Portal
01

Connect

Connect once to the Trust.med network.

We integrate with your systems and vendors.

02

Onboard

We onboard your trading partners.

Giving you control of your network.

03

Route

We intelligently route your data.

To the right partner, every time.

04

Deliver

We deliver your data across your network.

Accessible, complete, and ready to use.

Network solutions

We solve hard network connectivity problems.

Trust.med handles the routing, transformation, and delivery logic required to move data across complex pharmaceutical trading networks.

Routing

Direct data to the correct downstream trading partner.

Multi-Send

Send one data stream to multiple required destinations.

CMO Aggregation

Combine multiple upstream feeds into one clean inbound data flow.

Drop Ship

Handle nonstandard delivery paths across the network.

Rules Routing

Apply business logic to determine exactly where data should go.

Time Stamp Correction

Normalize event timing when source data arrives out of sequence.

Data Transformation

Convert source data into the format required by each endpoint.

Custom

Design workflows around partners and process requirements you have.

Design your network

Why customers choose us


Take control of your network.

Connectivity

Connect once. Reach every partner.

Establish a single connection to the network and exchange data across your entire partner ecosystem.

Cost Efficiency

Reduce integration and support costs.

Eliminate repeated partner integrations, connection fees, and the ongoing burden of maintaining point-to-point connections.

Flexibility

Adapt as your network evolves.

Support mergers, acquisitions, and system changes without rebuilding connections or disrupting partner communication.

DSCSA Readiness

Keep product data moving.

Ensure EPCIS data flows reliably between partners to support DSCSA compliance and operational continuity.

Next step


Connect to the network. Your way.

Connect once, simplify data exchange, and take control of how your network operates.
